footer.tagline: Knock down your workload. One agent at a time.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Welcome to the sevenlayers documentation. Learn how your private AI agent works, explore platform capabilities, and get started.
docs.qlAboutDesc: Learn how your private AI agent works
docs.qlPrivacyDesc: Class 1 privacy — your data never leaves your control
docs.qlSupportDesc: Get help and find answers to common questions
docs.aboutText: sevenlayers is a private AI agent platform for businesses that talk to customers. Deploy an AI agent that learns your business through conversation, handles operations across any channel, and compounds over time. Built for business owners who want to spend less time on repeatable work — and more time on what matters.

features.title: Conversational Onboarding
features.desc: Set up your AI agent through a conversation, not a form. Share how your business works. The agent builds itself.

features.title: Multi-Channel Deployment
features.desc: Deploy on WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, web, or any channel your customers already use.

features.title: Graduated Autonomy
features.desc: Your agent starts cautious and earns independence over time. You approve every change. It never goes rogue.

features.title: Your Brand & CRM
features.desc: Full platform with CRM, payments, booking, and email — everything runs under your brand on your domain.

features.title: Class 1 Privacy
features.desc: Run on our cloud, your hardware, or enterprise GPU. Bring your own model. Your data, your rules.

docs.nextStepsText: Ready to get started? Run the free diagnostic or explore the platform.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Get help with sevenlayers and your private AI agent
support.emailDesc: For general inquiries, technical issues, or feature requests.
support.bookCallDesc: Schedule a call for personalized assistance or partnership discussions.

faqs.q: How do I create an AI agent?
faqs.a: Start a conversation with our onboarding agent. It will ask about your business and build the agent from your answers. No forms or configuration needed.

faqs.q: What if the AI says something wrong?
faqs.a: Every agent knows when to escalate to a human. It starts cautious and only handles more as you approve. You control what it can and can't do.

faqs.q: Which channels can the agent use?
faqs.a: WhatsApp, Slack, Telegram, SMS, and web chat. Deploy on one or all — the agent adapts to each channel.

faqs.q: Does the agent get smarter over time?
faqs.a: Yes. The agent observes its own conversations, proposes improvements, and waits for your approval before changing anything. It gets better every week without losing your voice.
Yes. We use encryption (SSL/TLS), secure authentication, and follow GDPR requirements. You can also run entirely on your own hardware.
Yes, we offer custom enterprise solutions including on-premise GPU deployment. Contact us for more information.
We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24–48 business hours. Enterprise customers receive priority support.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data
privacy.s1Text: ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal data of our users ("User" or "you"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you access our services.
privacy.s2Text: The controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other national data protection laws is:
privacy.s2DpoText: As a small company with a single owner/operator and no core large-scale monitoring or special category data processing, we are not legally required to appoint a Data Protection Officer (Art. 37 GDPR). For all privacy inquiries, please contact us directly at the address above.
privacy.s3Intro: We accumulate certain data to provide our Service effectively:

s3Items.label: Financial Data
s3Items.desc: Payment details (processed securely via Stripe; we do not store full credit card numbers).

s3Items.label: Technical Data
s3Items.desc: IP address, login data, browser type and version, time zone setting, operating system.

s3Items.label: Usage Data
s3Items.desc: Information on how you use our website and Service, including audit logs of actions taken within the platform.

s3Items.label: User Content
s3Items.desc: Data input into the Service, including text for AI processing and generated results.

privacy.s4Intro: We process your data for the following purposes:
s4Items: To provide and operate the Service (including AI content generation).
To manage your account and subscription.
To improve our Service via analytics.
To detect and prevent fraud and security issues.
privacy.s5Intro: We process Personal Data under the following legal bases pursuant to the GDPR:

s5Items.label: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)
s5Items.desc: Use of cookies/tracking technologies and sending of marketing emails.

s5Items.label: Contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)
s5Items.desc: Processing necessary to perform the contract with you (e.g., providing the service, processing payments).

s5Items.label: Legitimate Interests (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR)
s5Items.desc: Network security, product improvement, and fraud prevention.

privacy.s6Intro: We share data with the following categories of third-party service providers (Subprocessors) to operate our business:

s6Items.label: AI Models
s6Items.desc: OpenAI, Anthropic — strictly for content generation request handling

privacy.s7Text: If we transfer data to countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA), such as to the US for certain AI or cloud services, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, primarily through the use of Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or reliance on the EU-US Data Privacy Framework where the provider is certified.
privacy.s8Intro: We retain personal data only as long as necessary:

s8Items.label: Account Data
s8Items.desc: For the duration of your account + transition period relative to deletion.

s8Items.label: Tax/Commercial Records
s8Items.desc: 6 to 10 years as required by German commercial and tax law (§ 257 HGB, § 147 AO).

s8Items.label: Audit Logs/Technical Data
s8Items.desc: 7 to 365 days depending on the tier and security relevance.

s8Items.label: AI Input/Output
s8Items.desc: Retained transiently for generation or as part of your saved content until deleted by you.

privacy.s9Intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

s9Items.label: Right to Withdraw Consent (Art. 7(3))
s9Items.desc: You may withdraw your consent at any time.

s9Items.label: Access, Rectification, Erasure
s9Items.desc: You can request to access, correct, or delete your data.

s9Items.label: Restriction & Objection
s9Items.desc: You may restrict processing or object to processing based on legitimate interests.

s9Items.label: Data Portability
s9Items.desc: You may request your data in a structured format.

s9Items.label: Complaint
s9Items.desc: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

privacy.s9AuthorityName: Der Landesbeauftragte für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit Mecklenburg-Vorpommern
privacy.s10Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures ("TOMs") including encryption (SSL/TLS), access controls, and regular security reviews to protect your data.
privacy.s11Text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date.
privacy.s12Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies on our platform
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us understand how you use our platform and improve your experience.
cookies.whichNote: The following cookies are used on our main platform (app.sevenlayers.io). This landing page itself does not set any third-party cookies.

tableRows.name: PostHog analytics (ph_*)
tableRows.purpose: Tracks anonymous usage patterns to help us improve the platform. Only active if you accept cookies.

tableRows.name: Convex session
tableRows.purpose: Keeps you logged in and authenticates your requests. Essential for the platform to work.

tableRows.name: cookie_consent
tableRows.purpose: Remembers your cookie preference (accepted or declined).

cookies.essentialText: (Convex session, cookie consent) are required for the platform to function. These cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsText: (PostHog) are optional. They are disabled by default and only activate if you click "Accept" on our cookie banner.
cookies.acceptDeclineTitle: What happens when you accept or decline?
cookies.acceptText: PostHog analytics starts collecting anonymous usage data (page views, feature usage, session duration). No personal data is sold or shared with advertisers.
cookies.declineText: PostHog stays disabled. Only essential cookies are used. The platform works the same either way.
manageItems: Use the cookie banner when you first visit the site
Clear your browser cookies at any time to reset your preference
Use your browser's built-in cookie settings to block cookies entirely
cookies.thirdPartyText: We use PostHog for analytics. PostHog processes data under their privacy policy. We do not use any advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or retargeting services.
cookies.changesText: We may update this policy as we add new features. Changes will be reflected in the "Last updated" date above.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The agreement that governs your use of our services
terms.s1Text1: Welcome to the services provided by Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt) ("Company", "we", "us", or "our"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of our software-as-a-service platform and website (collectively, the "Service").

s2Items.label: "Account"
s2Items.desc: The access authorization created by the User to use the Service.

s2Items.label: "Content"
s2Items.desc: Any data, text, files, information, usernames, images, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, sounds, musical works, works of authorship, applications, links, and other content or materials that you submit, post, or display on or via the Service.

s2Items.label: "Service"
s2Items.desc: The cloud-based software provided by Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt), including the sevenlayers platform and related integrations.

terms.s3EligibilityText: You must be at least 18 years old and capable of forming a binding contract to use the Service.
terms.s3InfoText: You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.
terms.s3SecurityText: You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Service and for any activities or actions under your password. You agree not to disclose your password to any third party.
terms.s4LicenseText: Subject to your compliance with these Terms, Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt) grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable license to access and use the Service for your internal business purposes or personal use.
s4RestrictionItems: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the Service.
Lease, lend, sell, or sublicense the Service.
Use the Service to build a competitive product.
Violate any applicable laws or regulations.
terms.s4ExceptionText: The restrictions on leasing, lending, selling, or sublicensing do not apply if you have entered into a separate valid Written Reseller Agreement or White-Label Agreement with Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt).
terms.s5Intro: You agree not to misuse the Service. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:
s5Items: Uploading or sharing content that is unlawful, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable.
Attempting to interfere with, compromise the system integrity or security, or decipher any transmissions to or from the servers running the Service.
Impersonating another person or otherwise misrepresenting your affiliation with a person or entity.
terms.s6OurRightsText: The Service and its original content (excluding Content provided by users), features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt) and its licensors.
terms.s6YourContentText: You retain ownership of any Content you submit. By submitting Content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, and display such Content solely for the purpose of providing, maintaining, and improving the Service.
terms.s7Text: The Service is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties.
terms.s8UnlimitedText: Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt) shall be liable without limitation for damages caused by intent (Vorsatz) or gross negligence (grobe Fahrlässigkeit), as well as for damages resulting from injury to life, body, or health, or under the Product Liability Act (Produkthaftungsgesetz).
terms.s8LimitedText: In cases of simple negligence (leichte Fahrlässigkeit), we shall only be liable for breaches of material contractual obligations (Kardinalspflichten) — obligations whose fulfillment is essential for the proper execution of the contract and on whose observance the user regularly relies. In such cases, liability is limited to the typically foreseeable damage at the time of contract conclusion.
terms.s8FreeTierText: For the free use of the Service, our liability for simple negligence is excluded, except for the cases mentioned in Section 8.1.
terms.s9Intro: If you are a consumer (Verbraucher) within the meaning of § 13 BGB, you have a statutory right of withdrawal.
terms.s9BoxText: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within 14 days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period will expire after 14 days from the day of the conclusion of the contract. To exercise the right of withdrawal, you must inform us (Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt), Am Markt 11, 17309 Pasewalk, support@sevenlayers.io) of your decision to withdraw from this contract by an unequivocal statement (e.g., a letter sent by post or e-mail).
terms.s9EffectsText: If you withdraw from this contract, we shall reimburse to you all payments received from you, including the costs of delivery, without undue delay and in any event not later than 14 days from the day on which we are informed about your decision to withdraw from this contract.
terms.s10OdrTextPre: The European Commission provides a platform for Online Dispute Resolution (ODR), which can be found at
terms.s10OdrTextPost: . We are generally not willing or obliged to participate in dispute settlement proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
terms.s10JurisdictionText: If the User is a merchant, a legal entity under public law, or a special fund under public law, the exclusive place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from this contractual relationship is Pasewalk, Germany. German law applies.
terms.s11Text: We may terminate or suspend your Account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.
terms.s12Text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

eula.s6TextPre: Your use of the Software is also governed by our

eula.s11Text: For questions about this EULA, please contact:

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Policy
dataDeletion.subtitle: How to request deletion of your personal data
dataDeletion.s1Text: Vound Brand UG (haftungsbeschränkt) ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to your right to data privacy. Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to request the deletion of your personal data. This page explains what data we collect through connected services, how to request its deletion, and what happens when you do.
dataDeletion.s2Intro: When you interact with our platform through connected services (WhatsApp, Slack, web, etc.), we may collect:

s2Items.label: User ID
s2Items.desc: A platform-specific identifier used to associate your conversations with your profile.

s2Items.label: Messages
s2Items.desc: Conversation content exchanged with our AI agent, used to provide personalized responses.

s2Items.label: Phone Number
s2Items.desc: If provided through WhatsApp or SMS.

s2Items.label: Interaction Metadata
s2Items.desc: Timestamps, message status (delivered, read), and session identifiers.

dataDeletion.s3Intro: You can request data deletion in two ways:
s3EmailItems: The platform you used (WhatsApp, Slack, Web, etc.)
Phone number or email associated with your account
A clear request to delete your data
dataDeletion.s3SupportTextPost: and submit a data deletion request.
dataDeletion.s4Intro: Upon receiving a valid deletion request, we will permanently remove:
s4Items: Your profile information and account data
All conversation history and message content
Phone number, email, and other contact identifiers
Any AI-generated content derived from your interactions
dataDeletion.s4ExceptionsText: We may retain certain data where required by law (e.g., tax records under § 257 HGB, § 147 AO) or for legitimate legal claims. Anonymized or aggregated data that cannot be linked back to you may also be retained.

s5Items.label: Acknowledgment
s5Items.desc: Within 48 hours of receiving your request.

s5Items.label: Verification
s5Items.desc: We may contact you to verify your identity.

s5Items.label: Deletion
s5Items.desc: Completed within 30 days of the verified request.

s5Items.label: Confirmation
s5Items.desc: You will receive email confirmation once deletion is complete.

dataDeletion.s6TextPre: After submitting a deletion request, you can check the status at any time by emailing
dataDeletion.s7Intro: Your right to data deletion is grounded in:

s7Items.label: GDPR Article 17
s7Items.desc: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")

s7Items.label: Platform Terms
s7Items.desc: Compliance with connected platform (Meta, WhatsApp, Slack) data deletion requirements

s7Items.label: BDSG
s7Items.desc: German Federal Data Protection Act supplementary provisions

dataDeletion.s8Text: For any questions about data deletion or this policy:
